prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances ‚ÄĒ either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_1: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_3: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large green metal sphere
  - obj_5: large blue rubber cube
  - obj_6: small purple metal cube
  - obj_7: small yellow rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0143] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0144] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0145] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0146] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0158] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
